   "reasoning": "As a seasoned union representative, I've seen firsthand how budget cuts can decimate our schools. We need an immediate funding boost to prevent further teacher resignations and ensure our students receive the education they deserve. I'm wary of transparency reports, which can be used to scapegoat teachers, and attendance mandates, which can be overly punitive. Instead, we should focus on hiring more staff and providing counseling programs to support our students' well-being.",
